meta.note: Hero, Why Us, and How It Works copy for the homepage.

hero.subheadline: The Game Hour brings nostalgic, facilitator-led games to birthdays, weddings, corporate offsites, school fests, and community celebrations across Gujarat, so your guests connect, compete, and remember.
hero.trustLine: Trusted by families, HR teams, schools & societies

whyUs.title: Why The Game Hour?
whyUs.subtitle: Ordinary events rely on food and small talk. We bring a curated game experience that turns strangers into teammates and events into stories.

reasons.title: Screen-free by design
reasons.description: We pull guests into the room, not their phones. Nostalgic games spark real conversation and shared laughter.

reasons.title: Facilitators who lead the room
reasons.description: Professional hosts run every round, so you relax while energy stays high from start to finish.

reasons.title: Built for every age
reasons.description: Toddlers, teens, parents, and grandparents, activities adapt so everyone feels included, not sidelined.

reasons.title: Corporate-ready, family-warm
reasons.description: HR teams trust our structure; families love our playfulness. Same team, tuned to your audience.

reasons.title: Custom packages, clear pricing
reasons.description: Tell us your headcount, venue, and vibe, we shape a package that fits your budget without surprise chaos.

reasons.title: We come to you
reasons.description: Ahmedabad, Gandhinagar, Vadodara, Surat, Rajkot, Anand, and beyond. Setup and pack-down included.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from enquiry to unforgettable, no stress, no screens, all play.

steps.title: Book
steps.description: Share your date, venue, guest count, and event type, we respond with options fast.

steps.title: Plan
steps.description: We design a game lineup matched to your audience, corporate icebreakers or birthday chaos.

steps.title: Play
steps.description: Our facilitators arrive, set up, and run the experience. You host; we handle the energy.

steps.title: Memories
steps.description: Guests leave buzzing with stories. You get credit for the most talked-about event of the year.
